game.title: Football Grid

help.title: How to play
help.rule: Name a footballer who matches both the row and the column of a cell.
help.tapHint: Not sure what a category means? Tap it on the grid to see.

game.notMatch: That player doesn't fit, so your turn passes.
game.searchHint: Start typing to search a footballer

imposter.title: Imposter

help.title: How to play
help.rule: Everyone but the imposter is given the same footballer. Over two rounds, take turns asking one another a question, then vote on who the imposter is. Get caught as the imposter? Guess the footballer to steal it back.

role.imposterBody: You weren't given a player. Blend in, bluff your answers, and don't get caught.

imposter.yourTurnAsk: Ask {{name}} your question, then tap Done

vote.title: Who's the imposter?
vote.hint: Tap the player you think was bluffing.
vote.voted: Vote cast. Waiting for the others…

reveal.caught: Caught! The group found the imposter.

redeem.prompt: You were caught. Guess the footballer to steal it back.

imposter.searchHint: Start typing to search a footballer
imposter.errorVote: Couldn't cast your vote. Try again.
imposter.errorGuess: Couldn't submit your guess. Try again.

mystery.title: Mystery Footballer
mystery.searchHint: Start typing to guess a footballer
mystery.lockedUntilTomorrow: Come back tomorrow for a new footballer

help.title: How to play
help.rule: Guess the mystery footballer in six tries. After each guess, every column turns green if it matches, yellow if it's close, and grey if it's wrong.
help.arrows: Arrows on Shirt and Debut point toward the secret player's value.
help.daily: A new footballer drops every day, the same for everyone.

legend.title: How the grid works
legend.intro: Name a footballer who matches both the row and the column of a cell. Here's what each axis on this grid means.

meaning.topLeagues: Has played in {{value}}+ of the top five leagues

bug.title: Report a bug
bug.desc: Tell us what went wrong, and what you were doing.
bug.error: Couldn't send your report. Please try again.

update.title: Update Miflo
update.body: You're on an older version of Miflo. Update to the latest version to keep playing with your friends.

settings.title: Settings
settings.hapticsDesc: Vibrations on taps and key moments.

stats.title: Stats
stats.comingSoonDesc: Your wins, streaks and favourite players will show up here.

aboutPage.title: About Miflo
aboutPage.blurb: Miflo is social party games for friends in the same room. Gather everyone, pick a game and play together.

howToPlay.title: How to play
howToPlay.intro: Miflo is played together in the same room. One phone starts a party and everyone else joins with the code.
howToPlay.step1Desc: Tap Create a party to get a code, or Join a party and type a friend's code.
howToPlay.step2Desc: The host picks a game once at least two players have joined.
howToPlay.step3Desc: On your turn, name a footballer who matches both the row and the column of a cell. Get three in a row to win.
howToPlay.step4Desc: Stuck? Skip your turn, or propose a tie. Everyone has to agree to end the game in a draw.
